hero.title: Build Your Child's <highlight>Math Confidence</highlight> with 1:1 Focus
hero.description: Personalized mathematics tutoring for ages 5-18. We turn uncertainty into confidence through structured, bilingual 1:1 sessions.

placeholder.cardDescription: A temporary hero placeholder while the final student image is being prepared.

benefits.title: Why Parents <highlight>Trust</highlight> iMath
benefits.description: We provide more than just tutoring; we provide an environment where children thrive and fall in love with mathematics.

focus.title: 1:1 Focused Learning
focus.description: Every session is tailored to your child's unique pace and style. No distractions, just progress.

progress.title: Accelerated Progress
progress.description: Our methodology helps students bridge gaps and move ahead of their school curriculum quickly.

confidence.title: Built-In Confidence
confidence.description: We don't just teach math; we build a problem-solving mindset that lasts a lifetime.

excellence.title: Certified Excellence
excellence.description: All our tutors are rigorously vetted and certified mathematically and pedagogically.

focus.title: 1:1 Focus Only
focus.description: No distractions. No groups. Just one teacher, one student, and maximum results.

tutors.title: Certified Tutors
tutors.description: Experts in bilingual math education, vetted for pedagogical excellence and parent trust.

trustSection.title: More than a Lesson, A <highlight>Transformation.</highlight>
trustSection.description: At iMath, we don't just deliver content; we deliver results. We believe that every child can master mathematics given the right environment, the right mentor, and the absolute focus they deserve.

quote.text: The confidence my son gained in his first month at iMath was astounding. He doesn't just solve problems; he explains them back to me with pride.
quote.author: Mother of Grade 5 Student

howItWorks.title: Your Child's Journey
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to transform math anxiety into confidence.

bookTrial.title: Book a Free Trial
bookTrial.description: Quick 2-minute booking to get started on your child's journey.

assessment.title: Initial Assessment
assessment.description: We determine the student's unique level and learning style.

startLearning.title: Start Learning
startLearning.description: Weekly 1:1 sessions tailored for peak academic excellence.

testimonials.title: Parent Stories
testimonials.description: Actual feedback from our growing iMath family.

amira.name: Mrs. Amira H.
amira.content: iMath has completely transformed my daughter's relationship with mathematics. She no longer fears the subject; she actually looks forward to her sessions!

omar.name: Mr. Omar F.
omar.role: Father of a high school student
omar.content: High-quality, professional, and results-oriented. The 1:1 focus is a game-changer compared to regular group tutoring. Truly recommended.

sarah.name: Mrs. Sarah L.
sarah.content: Excellent certified tutors who know how to engage children. My son's school grades improved by 30% in just two months. A great investment.

pricing.title: Flexible Learning Plans
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your family's schedule, goals, and location.
pricing.packageLabel: {months, plural, one {# Month Package} other {# Months Package}}
pricing.manualOverrideHint: You can override the detected country if a VPN or travel location is affecting the pricing context.
pricing.note: Prices are shown in {currency}. No online payment is collected on the site; subscriptions are handled entirely offline after the assessment.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.description: Everything you need to know about starting your iMath journey.

ages.question: What ages do you support?
ages.answer: We cater to students aged 5-18, from early childhood foundation to high school mathematics excellence.

format.question: Are the sessions 1:1 or in groups?
format.answer: All iMath sessions are strictly 1:1. We believe personalized focus is the key to mastering mathematics.

progress.question: How can I track my child's progress?
progress.answer: You'll receive a detailed monthly assessment report covering the student's progress, strengths, and goals for the next month.

schedule.question: Can we change our schedule?
schedule.answer: Yes, we offer flexible rescheduling options via our WhatsApp support team to accommodate your busy family life.

languages.question: Which languages are supported?
languages.answer: Tutoring is available in both Arabic and English. We help students master math in the language they use at school.

finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Child's <highlight>Future?</highlight>
finalCta.description: Book a free assessment today and let our team recommend the right starting point for your child.

footer.description: Empowering the next generation of problem solvers through personalized, bilingual mathematics tutoring. Certified excellence for students aged 5-18.

whatsApp.defaultMessage: Hello iMath, I'm interested in a free trial!
whatsApp.label: Chat with us

BookingModal.title: Book a Trial and We'll Contact You Quickly
BookingModal.description: Share a few details about your child and preferred schedule. Our team will review the request and follow up with the next available assessment slot.

parentName.label: Parent name
parentName.placeholder: Enter the parent or guardian name

email.label: Email address
email.hint: Optional, but helpful if you prefer email follow-up.

experience.advanced: Already doing well, wants to improve further

timezone.label: Detected timezone
timezone.hint: We use this to align the first follow-up and trial scheduling.

pricingContext.label: Pricing context
pricingContext.hint: The selected pricing country and currency are stored with your request so our team can follow up with the right package context.

BookingModal.privacyNote: By submitting this form, you allow iMath to contact you about your trial request using the details you provided.

success.title: Request Received
success.description: Your trial request has been submitted successfully. Our team will review it and contact you shortly to confirm the next steps.
success.nextStep: Expected next step: a WhatsApp or phone follow-up to schedule the assessment.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while submitting your request. Please try again.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phoneNumber: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.previousExperience: Please choose the student's previous experience level.
errors.preferredSlots: Please select at least one preferred time slot.

common.shellDescription: Review new trial requests, move leads through the pipeline, and follow up quickly.
common.headerDescription: Real-time lead visibility for the admissions workflow.

login.title: Admin Sign In
login.description: Use your authorized admin credentials to access the CRM workspace.
login.signInHint: Only authenticated and allowlisted accounts can access the admin dashboard.
login.signUpHint: Account creation is only useful for allowlisted admin emails. Unauthorized accounts will still be blocked from dashboard data.

errors.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while trying to authenticate.

notifications.title: New lead activity
notifications.description: {count, plural, one {# new lead needs review.} other {# new leads need review.}}

whatsapp.messageBody: We're following up on {studentName}'s request. Current status: {status}.

delivery.title: Notification delivery log
delivery.description: Latest Telegram delivery attempts for new lead alerts.

ops.title: Operational workflow
ops.description: Tutor assignment remains a manual off-platform step after the team reviews the lead, contacts the parent, and confirms the right teacher and time slot.

states.unauthenticated: Please sign in to view admin data.
states.notAuthorizedDescription: The signed-in account ({email}) is not included in the admin allowlist.
states.empty: No leads match the current filters.
states.selectLead: Select a lead to view the full details.
